title: Pearl Enters the Fight
description: On pages 9–12, Krieg’s forces push harder against the Baratie, using numbers, weapons, and intimidation while Sanji and the cooks struggle to hold the line.
scene: The restaurant becomes a battlefield where Krieg’s idea of strength clashes with the Baratie’s pride and the Straw Hats’ refusal to yield.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Does he want to be burned alive!?

dialogue.speaker: Pearl
dialogue.text: H-How could you attack me, the fire pearl that wild beasts won't even approach...!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: idiot. How could a chef ever cook,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: If he was afraid of fire?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why you dandy son of a...!

dialogue.speaker: Pearl
dialogue.text: He slipped past Pearl's Iron Wall!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: GRINCE - I'm not sure if you are going to

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aghhh! He's planning to burn down the restaurant!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This place is goners if the fire spreads to the kitchen!

summary: This part keeps increasing the pressure on the Baratie and exposes the brutality of Krieg’s command structure.
